title: Daily Brief — Monday 19 May 2026
content:
## Good Morning

This is your first Daily Brief delivered through the Daily Brief Hub. From today, every morning your personalised briefing will appear here — and your iPhone will buzz the moment it's ready.

## How It Works

Each day, your AI assistant compiles your brief, publishes it to this page, and sends a push notification to your phone via the ntfy app. No email required, no PC needed.

## What's Next

The daily routine will populate this page automatically. You can read the latest edition front and centre, and browse all previous editions in the archive below.

---

*Welcome to your Daily Brief Hub.*
